monogr.title: A Treatise of Artificial Magnets; In which is shewn an easy and expeditious Method of making them, Superior to the best Natural Ones: and also, A Way of improving the Natural Ones, and of changing or converting their Poles. Directions are likewise given For making the Mariner`s Needles in the best Form, and for touching them most adventageously, &c.
A Treatise of Artificial Magnets
